Shotaro Tada
Assistant Professor
Department of Metallurgical & Materials Engineering
Indian Institute of Technology Madras
Home Research Publications Teaching Students

About

My research focuses on precursor-derived ceramics and hybrid materials, with particular interest in surface chemistry and small-molecule activation (e.g., CO₂, H₂).

I combine experimental synthesis, structural characterization, and first-principles calculations to understand structure–property–reactivity relationships.

  • Precursor-derived ceramics
  • Surface chemistry and adsorption
  • Electronic structure analysis (DFT)
  • Advanced nitride ceramic powders
